localSourceOfTruth: blueprint/phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#5A. Network coordination contract, case model, and state machine
blueprint/phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#5B. Staff identity, organisation boundaries, and acting context
blueprint/phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#5C. Enhanced Access policy engine and network capacity ingestion
blueprint/phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#5D. Coordination queue, candidate ranking, and SLA engine
blueprint/phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#5E. Alternative offer generation, open choice, callback fallback, and patient continuity
blueprint/phase-5-the-network-horizon.md#5F. Native hub booking commit, practice continuity, and cross-org messaging

summary: External sources were used only to validate current NHS operational context, browser-proof technique, and dense board ergonomics. Local 311 to 313 contracts remained authoritative wherever semantics could diverge.

sources.title: Isolation | Playwright
borrowedInto: 314 board proof uses isolated browser contexts for desktop and reduced-motion mobile passes.
Parallel gate proof treats each view and filter state as a clean-slate scenario.
rejectedOrConstrained: No Playwright guidance changed local track readiness law or ownership semantics.

sources.title: Trace viewer | Playwright
borrowedInto: 314 board proof records trace artifacts for later review.
rejectedOrConstrained: Tracing remains proof evidence only, not a source of product semantics.

sources.title: Snapshot testing | Playwright
borrowedInto: 314 board proof captures ARIA snapshots for the board root and parity table.
rejectedOrConstrained: Snapshot capture does not replace explicit state and parity assertions.

sources.title: Care Identity Service (CIS) - NHS England Digital
borrowedInto: 314 gate keeps staff identity and acting-context work aligned to a current NHS identity boundary.
rejectedOrConstrained: CIS product wording did not override the frozen local field names in 311.

sources.title: Message Exchange for Social Care and Health - NHS England Digital
borrowedInto: 314 defers seq_335 until real continuity-routing code and non-production route configuration can be opened safely.
rejectedOrConstrained: MESH transport posture did not collapse local acknowledgement debt or truth-projection law.

sources.title: Message Exchange for Social Care and Health: client user guide - NHS England Digital
borrowedInto: Route setup remains an operational concern, reinforcing why seq_335 is deferred rather than opened speculatively.
rejectedOrConstrained: Guide workflow details were not imported into product contracts or UI semantics.

sources.title: Check answers – NHS digital service manual
borrowedInto: Inspector content stays summary-first and exposes explicit dependencies and change surfaces.
rejectedOrConstrained: The board is not a form wizard and does not inherit generic summary-page flow semantics.

sources.title: Confirmation page – NHS digital service manual
borrowedInto: The gate board keeps the main verdict calm and concise while leaving detailed conditions in adjacent regions.
rejectedOrConstrained: The board is not a release approval surface; it remains a constrained readiness board.

sources.title: Back link – NHS digital service manual
borrowedInto: Filter and selection changes preserve same-surface context instead of forcing route changes.
rejectedOrConstrained: Browser history was not treated as a substitute for explicit selected-track state.

sources.title: Table – NHS digital service manual
borrowedInto: Graph and table parity remain visible together on the gate board.
The readiness table keeps explicit column scope and concise headers.
rejectedOrConstrained: Table guidance did not override the three-region operational board layout.

sources.title: Data table usage
borrowedInto: Dense operational table ergonomics for the parity table and readiness rows.
rejectedOrConstrained: Carbon row-toolbar patterns were not imported into clinical or operational semantics.

sources.title: Observability
rejectedOrConstrained: Rejected as the primary board metaphor because the 314 gate is about ownership and readiness, not telemetry-first monitoring.

sources.title: Peek preview – Linear Docs
rejectedOrConstrained: Rejected as the main inspector model because the gate board needs a persistent synchronized right-hand inspector, not an ephemeral preview.
